OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk L. Fong, Not Reported (D501)

Appearances on WED-JAN-30-2013:
Plaintiff MERCY HOUSING CALIFORNIA is represented by Sister Lorna Walsh who is present with Attorney Daniel Bornstein
Defendant KELVIN RUSSELL is present with Attorney Erin Katayama

Respective counsel and the litigants confer in the hallway.

This case settles. The parties enter into a signed agreement which is NOT filed.

The trial date of FEB-04-2013 is vacated.
